mapper.update: update T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL set WORK_DATE= #{workDate}, CLASS_NAME= #{className}, CLASS_CODE= #{classCode}, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE= #{processDetailCode}, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME= #{processDetailName}, QUANTITY= 0, TON= 0, CLEAN_MASS_SIGN= '0', INOUT_STORAGE_CODE = #{inoutStorageCode}, INOUT_STORAGE_NAME = #{inoutStorageName}, REVOKE_CLEAN_BY=#{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REVOKE_CLEAN_BY_NAME=#{createByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REVOKE_CLEAN_TIME=#{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: update T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE set QUANTITY =#{quantity},TON = #{ton},CLEAN_MASS_SIGN= '0' where id = #{id}
select count (*) from T_BUS_CARGO_INFO where id = #{cargoInfoId} and IS_CLEAR = '1'

select TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO, case when TBH.TON is not null and tmp_tbtc.pla_ton is null then TBH.TON when TBH.ton is null and tmp_tbtc.pla_ton is not null then tmp_tbtc.pla_ton end ton, MASS_NAME||'-'||TBCI.CARGO_INFO_NO AS sheet_Name, TBCI.CARGO_NAME, TBCI.CARGO_OWNER_NAME customerName, decode(TBCI.PACKING_NAME,'件','件货','散','散货',TBCI.PACKING_NAME) as package_name, tbci.id as CARGO_INFO_ID , TPPS.MASS_ID as stack_id, TPPS.MASS_NAME stack_Name, to_char(nvl(wight_jg.WEIGH_IN_DT,psd.min_record_time),'yyyy-MM-dd') time_string, min_cre_u_name.USER_NAME createName, TPPS.QUANTITY||'件' "stackQua", TPPS.TON||'吨' "stackTon", (
select TO_CHAR(REGEXP_REPLACE(RTRIM(XMLCAST(XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT(E, TO_CHAR(TPDS.DEPT_NAME) || ',') ORDER BY TPDS.DEPT_NAME) AS CLOB), ','), '([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1')) from T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL TPPSD join T_YARD_TALLY TYT on TPPSD.CARGO_TALLY_ID = tyt.ID join T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY TPDS on TPDS.WORK_PLAN_ID = TYT.PLAN_ID and WORK_POSITION_CODE = '03' and WORK_POSITION_NAME = '水平' where TPPSD.PORT_STORAGE_ID = TPPS.ID group by TPPSD.PORT_STORAGE_ID ) machine_String
from T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE TPPS left join T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI on TPPS.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID left join T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH on TBCI.ID = TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID and TBH.LOAD_UNLOAD = '卸' left join (select sum(TBTC.TON) pla_ton, tbtc.CARGO_INFO_ID from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC left join T_BUS_TRUST TBT on tbt.id = TBTC.TRUST_ID where TBT.TYPE in ('拆箱集港','集港') group by tbtc.CARGO_INFO_ID) tmp_tbtc on tmp_tbtc.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID left join (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, MIN(TEMP.WEIGH_IN_DT) WEIGH_IN_DT FROM (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_IN_DT FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_IN_DT FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE IN ('集港', '拆箱集港')) TEMP GROUP BY TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID) wight_jg on wight_jg.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID left join (select min(CREATE_TIME) min_record_time,PORT_STORAGE_ID from T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL group by PORT_STORAGE_ID) psd on psd.PORT_STORAGE_ID = TPPS.ID left join ( select SU.USER_NAME , MSSP.STACK_ID from M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION MSSP join (select STACK_ID,min(CREATE_TIME) CREATE_TIME from M_STORAGE_STACK_POSITION group by STACK_ID) tmp_min on tmp_min.STACK_ID = MSSP.STACK_ID and tmp_min.CREATE_TIME = MSSP.CREATE_TIME left join SYS_USER SU on SU.ID = MSSP.CREATE_BY ) min_cre_u_name on min_cre_u_name.STACK_ID = TPPS.MASS_ID where TPPS.CARGO_INFO_ID||'_'|| TPPS.MASS_ID
#{item.sheetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
